title: Ability to change board's background colours

posts.author: nathanru (Nathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,

I would like to know if it’s possible to define a background colour for a board. Right now, you can define white mode or dark mode, which is then applied to all your boards. It would be great to give a background colour per board, or at least define white or dark mode also on board level.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to differentiate, based on the type of projects, a board colour, or at least make a distinction between my own boards, I would put in dark mode, and the ones where other people collaborate, in white mode.
